stemHtml: Which of the following describes the standard spin recovery?

options.a: Power to idle, ailerons neutral, opposite rudder, push controls forward.
options.b: Power to idle, ailerons opposite, rudder neutral, push controls forward.
options.c: Full Power, ailerons neutral, opposite rudder, pull controls backwards.
options.d: Full Power, ailerons opposite, rudder neutral, pull controls backwards.
